hero.description: Open-source feature flag platform built for modern development teams. Control rollouts, run experiments, and manage features across your entire stack.

features.title: Everything you need to manage features
features.subtitle: Powerful feature flag management with enterprise-grade capabilities, built for teams of all sizes.
features.featureTogglesDesc: Control feature rollouts with precision. Enable, disable, or gradually roll out features to specific user segments.
features.userTargetingDesc: Target features to specific users, groups, or segments. Test with beta users before full deployment.
features.abTestingDesc: Run experiments and measure impact. Make data-driven decisions with built-in analytics and metrics.
features.safeDeploymentsDesc: Decouple deployments from releases. Roll back instantly without redeploying your application.
features.sdkSupportDesc: Native SDKs for all major languages and frameworks. React, Node.js, Python, Go, and more.
features.realTimeUpdatesDesc: Changes propagate instantly. No waiting, no delays. Your users see updates in real-time.
features.multiEnvironmentDesc: Manage flags across development, staging, and production. Keep environments synchronized.
features.auditLogsDesc: Complete visibility into all changes. Track who changed what, when, and why with detailed logs.
features.codeExampleSubtitle: Get started in minutes with our intuitive SDKs. Add feature flags to your code with just a few lines.

comparison.title: How FlagBridge compares
comparison.subtitle: The only platform combining feature flags, product intelligence, and a plugin ecosystem.

openCore.title: Simple, transparent pricing
openCore.subtitle: Start free with open source. Scale with cloud. Enterprise when you need it.

techStack.title: Built with a modern stack
techStack.subtitle: Designed for performance, reliability, and developer experience.

cta.title: Ready to ship with confidence?
cta.subtitle: Start shipping features with confidence. Self-host or use our cloud.

developers.heroTitle:
Built for developers.
Loved by product teams.
developers.heroSubtitle: Feature flag management with product intelligence, a plugin ecosystem, and the developer experience you deserve.
developers.quickStartTitle: From zero to feature flags in 5 minutes
developers.sdkTitle: SDKs for every stack. OpenFeature from day one.
developers.sdkDescription: Native SDKs for all major languages with full OpenFeature support. Type-safe, tested, and built for production.
developers.testingDescription: Isolated test sessions for deterministic E2E tests.
developers.webhooksDescription: 9 event types · HMAC signed · 5 retries with backoff
developers.integrationsTitle: Send flag data where it matters.
developers.integrationsSubtitle: Managed connectors push evaluation events to your analytics and observability stack.
developers.buildPluginsTitle: Build plugins. Reach thousands. Get paid.
developers.pluginSdkDesc: Full access to the platform API and UI extensions
developers.pluginAudienceDesc: Reach thousands of teams using FlagBridge
developers.pluginRevenueDesc: Fair revenue share for plugin developers
developers.whySwitch1Desc: Run on your infrastructure with Docker Compose. Full control over your data and deployment.
developers.whySwitch2Desc: $29/mo vs $72k/yr with other vendors. No seat limits, no usage caps, no surprises.
developers.whySwitch3Desc: Zero vendor lock-in. Switch providers without changing code. Standards-first approach.
developers.whySwitch4Desc: Isolated sessions, SDK helpers for Playwright & Cypress. E2E tests that actually work.
developers.ctaSubtitle: Start shipping features with confidence. Self-host or use our cloud.

marketplace.heroTitle: Extend FlagBridge with the tools you already use.
marketplace.heroSubtitle: Plugins for messaging, analytics, queues, and more. Install in one click. Build your own and get paid.
marketplace.featuredSlackDesc: Get instant notifications when flags change in any environment
marketplace.featuredMixpanelDesc: Track flag evaluations as Mixpanel events automatically
marketplace.featuredKafkaDesc: Stream all flag events to Kafka topics in real-time
marketplace.forEngineeringDesc: Connect feature flags to your infrastructure. Integrate with Kafka, SQS, GitHub, GitLab, OpenFeature, and more. Self-hosted or cloud, your choice.
marketplace.engFeature1Desc: Publish flag changes to Kafka, SQS, RabbitMQ. React to flag state in real-time across your infrastructure.
marketplace.engFeature2Desc: GitHub/GitLab plugins scan your codebase to find flag references. Know what is safe to remove.
marketplace.engFeature3Desc: Stream flag metrics to Datadog, New Relic, PostHog. Monitor adoption and performance impact.
marketplace.forProductDesc: Connect flags to your product workflow. Integrate with Linear, Jira, Resend, RD Station, Mixpanel, and Amplitude. Ship features that drive outcomes.
marketplace.prodFeature1Desc: Attach hypothesis, KPIs, and go/no-go criteria to every flag. Keep product context close to code.
marketplace.prodFeature2Desc: Trigger Resend/RD Station campaigns when rollout hits milestones. Keep stakeholders informed.
marketplace.prodFeature3Desc: Mixpanel/Amplitude plugins correlate flag variants with user behavior and conversion metrics.
marketplace.forDevTitle: Build for the ecosystem. Get paid.
marketplace.forDevSubtitle: Build plugins that solve real problems, publish with one command, earn 80% of every sale.
marketplace.testimonial1: The plugin ecosystem saved us weeks of integration work. We connected our entire stack in an afternoon.
marketplace.testimonial2: Building our own internal plugin was surprisingly easy. The SDK is well-documented and the community helped us ship fast.
marketplace.testimonial3: We switched from LaunchDarkly and the Mixpanel plugin alone justified the migration. Data flows seamlessly now.
